name: Adaire Fox-Martin
background: Adaire Fox-Martin has served as our President and Chief Executive Officer since June 2024. Prior to joining Equinix, she served as President of Google Cloud Go-to-Market and Head of Google Ireland from July 2021 to June 2024. Before Google, she had a 13-year career at SAP, where she held various leadership roles, including Executive Board Member and President of Global Customer Success.

company_affiliations.name: Equinix, Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Member of the Board of Directors
